example.value: "Tugas mabek keral, bior terbor kak, pog ru sayo. Tugas mabek kerdor, bior berencet. Tugas mabek bujang, bior siksuj," tok penghulu kipasal tugas-tugas jik mase caknak teniba Menteri Besar nu kampug jik ku gecek keknit doh.

translation.value: "Tugas golongan lelaki adalah menyiang ikan, ayam dan sayur. Tugas golongan perempuan adalah memasak. Tugas golongan bujang adalah mencuci segala pinggan dan mangkuk," tok penghulu memberitahu tugas-tugas kami semasa kenduri sempena ketibaan Menteri Besar ke kampung kami pada bulan hadapan.

"The job of the men is to clean and prepare the fish, the chicken and the vegetables. The job of the women is to cook. The job of the unmarried is to wash all the dishes and utensils," the village chief told each group our duties during the feast in conjunction with the visitation of the Chief Minister to our village next month.

definitionorgloss.value: orang kita; panggilan oleh Orang Semai kepada bangsa sendiri; Orang Asli
"our people"; expression by the Semai to call their own race; Indigenous people; Orang Asli

example.value: "Kek ajeh mai ma? Ngtanya medei irenis pek begei ha mai hik, tapi buleh kibelwal engrok hik," Wak Hani kitanya nu Bah Tam.

translation.value: "Dia orang apa? Saya bertanya kerana rupanya tidak seperti orang kita Orang Asli, tetapi dia boleh bercakap dalam bahasa kita," Wak Hani bertanya kepada Bah Tam.
"What is her race? I am asking because she does not look like the our people, but she can speak our language," Wak Hani asked Bah Tam.

example.value: Entem, mase ku jaman perag, musoh hik ajeh mai Jepon.

translation.value: Dahulu, semasa zaman perperangan, musuh kita adalah orang Jepun.
In the past, during the war, our enemies were the Japanese.

example.value: "Hik pek buleh hibemusoh ru mai kilek," atok jik kibesat nu jik mase jik lekat jisanget entem.

translation.value: "Kita tidak boleh bermusuhan dengan orang lain," datuk kami berpesan kepada kami sewaktu kami masih kanak-kanak dahulu.
"We can't be hostile to other people," our grandfather told us when we were kids.
